# Getting Help with `HumanPilot`

Thank you for your interest in `HumanPilot`.

## Where to ask questions

For bug reports, reproducibility questions, and feature requests, please
use [GitHub issues](https://github.com/LieberInstitute/HumanPilot/issues).
Public questions help other researchers find answers later.

## What to include

When possible, include:

- a short description of the problem or question
- links to the files or sections you are using
- a minimal reproducible example for code-related issues

## Sensitive information

Do not post sensitive, private, or restricted data in public issues. For
non-public institute questions, use [info@libd.org](mailto:info@libd.org).
